title: Apply conditional formatting to subitems
excerpt: Unfortunately, conditional formatting is applied on at an item level, how to have it applied to subitems?

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, conditional formatting is applied on at an item level, how to have it applied to subitems?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @skmdc,

This isn’t currently supported, I apologise for the setback! Please add your vote to the existing request here → Conditional Formatting of subitems

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@skmdc,
There is no way to directly apply conditional formatting to subitems in monday.com
